# External Debt Stocks (DOD, Current US$) — Selected Countries, 2017–2022

| Country name | 2017 | 2018 | 2019 | 2020 | 2021 | 2022 |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| Ethiopia | 26,900,000,000 | 27,800,000,000 | 28,600,000,000 | 29,400,000,000 | 30,200,000,000 | 31,100,000,000 |
| Kenya | 54,200,000,000 | 57,600,000,000 | 62,100,000,000 | 67,300,000,000 | 70,900,000,000 | 74,800,000,000 |
| Ghana | 45,700,000,000 | 49,900,000,000 | 55,400,000,000 | 61,800,000,000 | 66,200,000,000 | 70,500,000,000 |
| Nigeria | 85,000,000,000 | 94,200,000,000 | 105,100,000,000 | 115,700,000,000 | 127,400,000,000 | 139,900,000,000 |
| Pakistan | 91,300,000,000 | 96,700,000,000 | 103,500,000,000 | 111,900,000,000 | 121,600,000,000 | 132,400,000,000 |
| Bangladesh | 56,100,000,000 | 60,900,000,000 | 66,400,000,000 | 73,200,000,000 | 80,700,000,000 | 89,500,000,000 |
| Sri Lanka | 51,400,000,000 | 53,600,000,000 | 55,900,000,000 | 57,800,000,000 | 59,200,000,000 | 60,100,000,000 |
